message:
refactor(tests): migrate notifications, restore_scrollback, restore_layout, diagnostic, reports from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 49 #[tokio::test] async tests across 5 files to #[test] with
run_async_test helper backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder:
- notifications.rs: 12 tests
- restore_scrollback.rs: 8 tests
- restore_layout.rs: 14 tests
- diagnostic.rs: 5 tests
- reports.rs: 10 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
